meaning: n.逶ｸ蟇ｹ諤ｧ,逶ｸ蜈ｳ諤ｧ,[迚ｩ]逶ｸ蟇ｹ隶ｺ
examples: According to the theory of relativity, nothing can travel faster than light.
Einstein's theory of relativity won for him universal esteem.
My colleague mentioned how the theory of relativity completely changed the field of physics.
He rewrote the equations of general relativity to make them compatible with quantum mechanics.
Numerical relativity calculations continue to bear fruit for researchers exploiting the Sony Playstation 3.
